query:
ALTER TABLE receipts 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lineItems JSON,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS overheadCategory VARCHAR(128),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fileName VARCHAR(255);
